member.name: T:FileInfo
member.summary:
Current information for a file, including its size.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:FileInfo.FromProtobuf(Proto.FileGetInfoResponse.Types.FileInfo)
member.summary: Create a file info object from a ptotobuf.

member.name: M:FileInfo.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a file info object from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: P:FileInfo.FileId
member.summary: The ID of the file for which information is requested.

member.name: P:FileInfo.ExpirationTime
member.summary: The current time at which this account is set to expire.

member.name: P:FileInfo.IsDeleted
member.summary: True if deleted but not yet expired.

member.name: P:FileInfo.Keys
member.summary: One of these keys must sign in order to delete the file. All of these keys must sign in order to update the file.

member.name: P:FileInfo.FileMemo
member.summary: The memo associated with the file

member.name: P:FileInfo.LedgerId
member.summary: The ledger ID the response was returned from; please see HIP-198 for the network-specific IDs.
